# Ilika

Website: https://ilika.in

## Canonical URL Policy

- Product URLs must use only the stored `productUrl` field.
- Product URL format: https://ilika.in/product/{productUrl}
- Product titles must not be used to generate canonical product URLs.

## Static URLs

https://ilika.in/
https://ilika.in/products
https://ilika.in/shopall
https://ilika.in/offers
https://ilika.in/glow-therapy-comb
https://ilika.in/hydration-glow-combo
https://ilika.in/mask-combo
https://ilika.in/blog
https://ilika.in/about
https://ilika.in/about/why-ilika
https://ilika.in/about/quality-promise
https://ilika.in/about/ingredient-philosophy
https://ilika.in/contact
https://ilika.in/voice-mask-maker
https://ilika.in/nonvoice-mask-maker
https://ilika.in/leafless-hair-dryer
https://ilika.in/blackseed-hair-oil
https://ilika.in/herbal-hair-oil

## Product URLs

No product URLs generated.

## Category URLs

No category URLs generated.

## Blog URLs

No blog URLs generated.
